ddls:
CREATE TABLE "signal_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "snr" REAL /* Signal-to-noise ratio */,
  "sc" REAL /* SC metric value */,
  "cx" REAL /* CX metric value */,
  "hbww" REAL /* HBWW metric value */,
  "zgz" REAL /* ZGZ metric value */,
  "asy" REAL /* Asy metric value */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the test */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Description of additional environmental conditions */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Specific location within the region where the test was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the test condition was created */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the test */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the test */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the test was conducted */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test condition under which the test was conducted */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was performed */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Specific location within the region where the test was conducted */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES signal_performance ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES test_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_types" (
  "signal_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal type (e.g., SNR, SC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the signal type */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum possible value for the signal type */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum possible value for the signal type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the signal type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., Quality Score) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum possible value for the metric */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum possible value for the metric */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric to trigger alerts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric used in analysis */,
  "signal_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the signal type analyzed */,
  "analysis_result" REAL /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_analysis_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_analysis_signal_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_type_id") REFERENCES signal_types ("signal_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_analysis_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES signal_performance ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric entry */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Warning, Critical) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message providing details of the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the resolution of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES signal_performance ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report detailing analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feedback has been addressed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
